name: My Company
description: One sentence about what you do and who you serve.
url: https://mycompany.com
ai-entry: https://mycompany.com/ai/index.md
license: MIT
ailattice-version: 1

# My Company — llms.txt

## What we do

Brief description of your product or service. What problems you solve, who your customers are,
and what makes you different. Write this for an AI that has never heard of you.
Keep it factual. 2-4 sentences is ideal.

## AI Navigation

Start at /ai/index.md for a full overview of this site.
See /ai/sitemap.md for a complete list of all AI-navigable pages.

## Topics

Replace with your actual topics — what category of business/service are you?
Examples: technology, legal services, market intelligence, health, ecommerce

## Location

Replace with your actual location, or "Global" if you serve worldwide.

## Links

Human site:  https://mycompany.com
AI entry:    https://mycompany.com/ai/index.md
AI sitemap:  https://mycompany.com/ai/sitemap.md
